description: Grupo Financiero Galicia S.A., a financial service holding company, provides various financial products and services to individuals and companies in Argentina. The company operates through Bank, Naranja X, Insurance, and Other Businesses segments. It offers savings, checking, and time deposits; and credit and debit cards. The company also provides personal loans, salary advance, express loans, AfterPay, Buy Now Pay Later, flexible loans, and overdrafts for individuals; and immediate loans, discount of electronic credit invoice and e-checks, pledge and mortgage loans, Sociedad de Garantía Recíp
